name: Captain Lin Xiu-Ying
description:
Born in Macau to a Portuguese merchant and a Cantonese bookkeeper. Learned trade and navigation before she learned to curtsy. After her father's death — an "accident" arranged by competitors — the family collapsed into debt. Her mother sold everything to send her to the New World.

In the Caribbean, she worked her way up from chartmaker's assistant to privateer's clerk to smuggler's navigator. When her captain was killed in a Spanish ambush, she took command, saved the ship, and talked her way into a privateering patent from men who did not want to give it.

Now she captains the brigantine Arrow — young, unproven, and determined to build a reputation not on legend but on results. She sails the line between legitimacy and piracy, armed with a quick mind, a quicker tongue, and a refusal to be anyone's tool ever again.
creator: Babaduk
